rule: Treat v2 as the active descriptive exposure denominator policy going forward.
Where DIRECTION_FACTOR is valid, apply it to stable AADT exposure in the approved window-grain descriptive denominator context.
Where DIRECTION_FACTOR is null, fall back to v1 bidirectional AADT treatment.
Where DIRECTION_FACTOR is invalid, flag the row for review and retain transparent fallback handling rather than silently applying the factor.
Do not apply DIRECTION_FACTOR outside the approved descriptive exposure denominator context.
Retain v1 outputs as baseline and legacy comparison artifacts; do not overwrite or delete them.
Preserve caveat that source documentation is still needed to fully confirm field semantics.
